description: Canonical DAG for bootstrap / preflight invariant phases. C.metrics installs metrics-server (metrics.k8s.io) after C.infra; C.images gates Colima VM Docker image availability for ingress (caddy/envoy tcpdump) before G.app_runtime; G gates workload HTTP readiness before D and F; E follows D and F.

A.workspace.description: Workspace determinism (lockfile, build artifacts, alignment venv / matplotlib)

B.crypto.description: Cryptographic root integrity on disk (dev CA + edge leaf + Kafka material)

C.infra.description: Cluster substrate (nodes, kube-system, MetalLB CRDs, ingress namespaces — before metrics-server)

C.metrics.description: metrics-server in kube-system (kubectl apply -k infra/k8s/base/metrics-server; k3s/Colima patch; rollout + kubectl top + bench_logs/bootstrap.prom headroom)

C.images.description: Colima/k3s runtime image availability (infra/required_images.json — docker save | colima ssh docker load before edge rollouts)

G.app_runtime.description: Application readiness (scripts/verify-app-runtime.sh + infra/app_runtime_services.json — parallel rollout + /healthz, retries + exponential backoff, VERIFY_APP_RUNTIME_MODE=ci fail-fast, Prometheus gauges + histogram _bucket lines + JSONL history for cold/warm deltas; see docs/APP_RUNTIME_READINESS_BOUNDARY.md)

D.observability.description: Jaeger query Service reachable (in-cluster / port-forward contract)
